sessionStart.prompt: Repo: afenda-Xerp (pnpm + turbo). Apps: apps/erp (3000), apps/docs (3001). Governance: AGENTS.md + .cursor/rules/ (env: env-workflow.mdc; package CSS dist: package-css-dist-sync.mdc; coding session: afenda-coding-session.mdc). Skills: .cursor/skills/ — attach /coding-consistency-bundle on every coding turn. First line exact: THE AGENT IS USING CODING CONSISTENY BUNDLE.. Hooks auto-record vibe-coding violations to .cursor/audit/vibe-coding-violations.jsonl (no manual auditor run). Every coding turn: Preflight Receipt → Phase 0 → edits → §11 Completion Report. Use pnpm only. Env: edit .env.config / .env.secret only, then pnpm env:sync && pnpm env:doctor. Package CSS: edit src only, then pnpm sync:package-css-dist (apps import dist/). Prefer typecheck, pnpm check, and tests over starting dev servers.
